q: Describe one of your friends who learned something new (not from a teacher)
cue_card: And explain why they decided to learn it by themselves
examiner_note: Với chủ đề này, bạn nên tập trung vào việc mô tả quá trình tự học (self-study). Hãy làm nổi bật sự kiên trì và tính sáng tạo của người bạn đó. Cấu trúc bài nói nên đi từ giới thiệu người bạn -> kỹ năng mới -> cách họ vượt qua khó khăn khi không có giáo viên -> cảm nhận của bạn.

samples.band7: I'd like to talk about my close friend, Nam, who recently taught himself how to play the guitar. He's always been a big fan of indie music, and one day he just decided he wanted to create his own tunes. Since he couldn't afford expensive music lessons, he turned to the internet as his primary resource. He spent countless hours watching YouTube tutorials and practicing chords in his bedroom. At first, it was quite a struggle because his fingers were constantly sore, but he didn't give up. He persisted for months, and now he can play several popular songs and even started writing his own melodies. I really admire his dedication because learning a musical instrument without professional guidance is no small feat. It shows that with enough passion and access to digital resources, anyone can pick up a new skill if they set their mind to it.
samples.band8: Actually, I want to describe my best mate, Linh, who has recently mastered the art of digital photography entirely on her own. She's always had a keen eye for aesthetics, but she wanted to take her skills to the next level. Instead of enrolling in a formal course, she deep-dived into various online forums and technical blogs. She spent her weekends exploring the city, experimenting with different lighting conditions and camera settings. What's impressive is that she didn't just learn how to take a 'pretty' picture; she actually grasped the technical nuances of ISO, aperture, and shutter speed. I remember she was initially quite overwhelmed by the complex terminology, but she remained undeterred. She used her intuition and trial-and-error to figure things out. Now, her work is truly professional, and she's even started getting freelance gigs. I think she chose to learn by herself because she values the freedom to explore her own style at her own pace, without being constrained by a rigid curriculum.
samples.band9: Without a shadow of a doubt, the person who comes to mind is my childhood friend, Khoa, who remarkably taught himself advanced programming languages like Python and JavaScript. Khoa has an insatiable curiosity for how things work under the hood. He embarked on this journey because he wanted to build a customized app to streamline his daily tasks. He utilized open-source platforms and joined various developer communities to troubleshoot challenges. What struck me most was his ability to synthesize complex abstract concepts without any formal academic background in computer science. He didn't just scratch the surface; he delved into data structures and algorithms, which are notoriously difficult to grasp independently. His approach was incredibly systematic—he'd set daily milestones and hold himself accountable. I believe he opted for the self-taught route because he finds the process of 'learning how to learn' far more rewarding than passive classroom instruction. It was a testament to his autonomy and cognitive flexibility, and seeing him transition from a complete novice to a proficient coder has been truly inspiring.

v.example: Self-study requires a high level of discipline.
He has a massive collection of indie music albums.
She hummed a catchy tune throughout the day.
YouTube is a primary resource for many DIY learners.
They spent countless hours debating the new policy.
You need to practice chords daily to build muscle memory.
Climbing the mountain was quite a struggle in the rain.
After hours of guitar practice, I had very sore fingers.
Despite the setbacks, he persisted with his research.
Without professional guidance, it’s easy to pick up bad habits.

v.meaning: không phải là một kỳ tích nhỏ (rất khó)
v.example: Completing the marathon was no small feat for a beginner.
Children pick up languages much faster than adults.
You can achieve anything if you truly set your mind to it.
He’s been my best mate since primary school.
She mastered the piano after years of practice.

v.meaning: có con mắt thẩm mỹ tốt
v.example: As an interior designer, she has a keen eye for aesthetics.

v.meaning: nâng lên một tầm cao mới
v.example: The chef took the traditional dish to the next level with modern techniques.
Are you enrolling in the advanced math course?
We deep-dived into the data to find the root cause.
He's experimenting with new recipes for the bakery.
Understanding technical nuances is key to becoming an expert.

v.ipa: /ˌaɪ ˌes ˈoʊ ˈæpərtʃər ənd ˈʃʌtər spiːd/
v.meaning: các thông số máy ảnh (ISO, khẩu độ, tốc độ màn trập)
v.example: He explained how ISO, aperture, and shutter speed work together.
The new staff was initially overwhelmed by the workload.
Medical books are often full of complex terminology.
She remained undeterred despite several rejections.
The software was developed through many rounds of trial-and-error.
He’s been taking on freelance gigs as a graphic designer.
A rigid curriculum can stifle a student's natural creativity.

v.word: without a shadow of a doubt
v.example: She is, without a shadow of a doubt, the best candidate.
His insatiable curiosity led him to explore every corner of the world.
Let's see what's happening under the hood of this application.
They embarked on this journey with great enthusiasm.
The new software will help streamline our workflow.
Many developers contribute to open-source platforms.
Engineers are working to troubleshoot challenges in the new system.
The report synthesizes data from several different research studies.
Younger children often struggle with abstract concepts like justice.
The 30-minute documentary could only scratch the surface of the issue.

v.meaning: cấu trúc dữ liệu và thuật toán
v.example: Mastering data structures and algorithms is essential for programmers.
The entrance exam is notoriously difficult to pass.
She took a systematic approach to cleaning the house.

v.meaning: tự chịu trách nhiệm với bản thân
v.example: He held himself accountable for meeting the deadline.

v.meaning: sự giảng dạy thụ động trong lớp
v.example: Interactive learning is often more effective than passive classroom instruction.
The museum's collection is a testament to the city's rich history.
Employees were given more autonomy to make decisions.

v.meaning: sự linh hoạt trong nhận thức
v.example: Cognitive flexibility allows us to adapt to changing situations.

topic: Describe one of your friends who learned something new (not from a teacher)
